problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Combining Liquid crystal elastomer actuation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 16 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
